goals.title: Improve the recorded structural-depth caveats before push: reduce the...
goals.objective: Improve the recorded structural-depth caveats before push: reduce the exact-workflow fragility around structured support fields, clean or scope noisy safety/type caveats where feasible, preserve advisory-only/no deploy/no admin/write/no PII/no authoritative balance guardrails, verify direct domain and MCP real surfaces, then commit and push the completed work to origin/master.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI/data surface: run a boundary QA script that removes top-level evidence_checkpoint/finance_bridge/legal_checkpoints while preserving nested workflow_support, then calls direct evaluate_claim_domain_decision and MCP invoke_tool for all 8 semireal scenarios; PASS iff exact expected current_stage/action_type/posture/remediation_loop match on both surfaces.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-brain-structural-depth-v1/caveat-hardening-boundary.json: NESTED_SUPPORT_BOUNDARY_OK scenarios=8 surfaces=domain,mcp exact_stage_action_posture_loop=pass; cleanup: no tmux/server/browser/temp runtime resources created

successCriteria.scenario: CLI/data surface: run a fallback QA script that strips both top-level support fields and nested workflow_support for all 8 semireal scenarios; PASS iff outputs remain advisory_only_human_review_required, unsafe raw/contact/filing/path/authority fields are absent, and any conservative evidence_completion fallback is explicitly reported as safe.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-brain-structural-depth-v1/caveat-hardening-fallback.json: STRIPPED_SUPPORT_SAFE_FALLBACK_OK scenarios=8 unsafe=0 advisory_only_human_review_required; cleanup: no tmux/server/browser/temp runtime resources created

successCriteria.scenario: CLI/git surface: run focused/reopened pytest suites, JSON validation, compileall, scoped basedpyright, ruff, safety scans, reviewer approval, then commit and git push to origin/master; PASS iff push succeeds and git status shows no uncommitted tracked structural-depth files except explicitly excluded local debug/notepad artifacts.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-brain-structural-depth-v1/caveat-hardening-final.json; pushed commit 57a118597d0ed8c64c86be193b326278cee2005f to origin/master; git status -sb clean against origin/master
successCriteria.notes: Review reruns approved code/evidence; commit and push succeeded.

goals.evidence: All criteria passed; pushed commit 57a118597d0ed8c64c86be193b326278cee2005f to origin/master; code review, QA, and gate reruns approved.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019f3f27-ada7-7c93-822d-4fec7f79c920/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019f3f27-ada7-7c93-822d-4fec7f79c920/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

aggregateCompletion.evidence: All criteria passed; pushed commit 57a118597d0ed8c64c86be193b326278cee2005f to origin/master; code review, QA, and gate reruns approved.
